title: Fix DPI-C and protect-lib if port is implicit logic

features.name: DPI-C function with implicit logic unpacked array port
features.description: Code should include a DPI-C imported function with an unpacked array parameter declared as implicit logic (1-bit wire without logic keyword)

features.name: module port as implicit logic unpacked array
features.description: Code should include a module port declaration that is an unpacked array of implicit 1-bit logic without the logic keyword
